high_issues.issue: Freqtrade CLI backtest path does not export or parse real Freqtrade results and returns empty metrics after CLI completion.
Data download path always generates synthetic sample data after optional Freqtrade download; actual downloaded Freqtrade files are not imported.
Risk gate does not implement dry-run divergence, runtime look-ahead review, archived status, or approved_for_dry_run promotion.
Decision output hardcodes symbol BTC/USDT and deletes all historical decisions on each build.
No .gitignore found while generated database/data/report/cache artifacts exist in the workspace.

medium_issues.issue: Spec validator is whitelist-based but shallow; it does not enforce numeric bounds for stop loss/take profit or deeply validate condition object types.
Look-ahead detection is simple substring matching and will miss many future-data patterns.
Dashboard pages exist but several are simple placeholders and do not show full readiness or failure diagnostics.
Most non-Freqtrade engines are scaffold only.
Tests cover basic units only; missing integration, parser, optional engine, safe defaults, and dashboard smoke tests.

low_issues.issue: Generated strategies import numpy but do not use it.
insert_dict builds SQL with table names from caller; current callers are internal, but this should remain constrained.
Formatting/indentation in store_regimes row tuple is uneven.

missing_features: Real Freqtrade exported-result parser integration in batch runner
LEAN backtest runner and result parser beyond placeholder
Qlib dataset conversion and experiment runner beyond placeholder
FinceptTerminal analytics/UI module beyond mention/config role
Dry-run log ingestion and backtest-vs-dry-run divergence review
Separate fee and slippage adjusted metrics
Dashboard engine missing-warning panels with actionable detail
recommended_next_steps: Make Freqtrade CLI path real: use userdir/config/export filename, parse exported JSON, store standardized metrics.
Change data adapter to import actual Freqtrade OHLCV files when CLI download is used, and only synthesize data under explicit --sample flag.
Strengthen risk gate with dry-run divergence, look-ahead metadata checks, archived workflow, and approved_for_dry_run criteria.
Fix decision engine to emit per-symbol decisions and preserve historical decisions.
Add integration tests for full v1 pipeline on temporary database and generated temp dirs.
